channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 新卒の方が高給なら「転職検討」7割超 初任給上げ相次ぎ、逆転懸念 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZ…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
新卒の方が高給なら「転職検討」7割超　初任給上げ相次ぎ、逆転懸念
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

新卒の給与引き上げには全体の8割近くが「必要」と回答。

一方、現場の中心を担う中堅層に限ると賛成は半数以下で、慎重な見方をしていることが分かりました。
item.content:encoded:
新卒の方が高給なら「転職検討」7割超　初任給上げ相次ぎ、逆転懸念
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

新卒の給与引き上げには全体の8割近くが「必要」と回答。

一方、現場の中心を担う中堅層に限ると賛成は半数以下で、慎重な見方をしていることが分かりました。

item.title: note.com/reading_monk... 「「分からないものを、分かったふりをして使うな」と教えたはずの事件は、…
item.author: 増田聡 (@smasuda.bsky.social)
item.description: note.com/reading_monk... 「「分からないものを、分かったふりをして使うな」と教えたはずの事件は、皮肉にも、「ソーカル事件を分からないまま使う人々」を最大の担い手として生き延びた」
item.content:encoded: note.com/reading_monk... 「「分からないものを、分かったふりをして使うな」と教えたはずの事件は、皮肉にも、「ソーカル事件を分からないまま使う人々」を最大の担い手として生き延びた」

item.title: バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求め…
item.author: 星 暁雄 (Akio Hoshi) (@akiohoshi.bsky.social)
item.description:
バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求める法案"the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act"を提出。

「20MW以上の電力を消費し、液体冷却を採用し、定格出力20kW以上のラックを備え、AIモデルの大規模なトレーニングや運用に使用される施設」の建設や拡張の一時停止を求める。
item.content:encoded:
バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求める法案"the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act"を提出。

「20MW以上の電力を消費し、液体冷却を採用し、定格出力20kW以上のラックを備え、AIモデルの大規模なトレーニングや運用に使用される施設」の建設や拡張の一時停止を求める。

item.title: 本日のグッズ発送、真悠さんブラックナイトと真琴ブルマーアクスタ、コミケで毎回一作アクキーシリーズの見栄子と真悠さんアクキ…
item.author: 小武『女主任・岸見栄子』単行本発売中 (@xiaowoo.jp)
item.description: 本日のグッズ発送、真悠さんブラックナイトと真琴ブルマーアクスタ、コミケで毎回一作アクキーシリーズの見栄子と真悠さんアクキープラスなすびみえこアクキー、各月フルーツ娘たんシリーズアクスタから「いちご」「ちぇりー」「めろん」「ぱぱいや」「ここなつ」「きょほう」「ばなな」たちが出動ｯの豪華セットです！
item.content:encoded: 本日のグッズ発送、真悠さんブラックナイトと真琴ブルマーアクスタ、コミケで毎回一作アクキーシリーズの見栄子と真悠さんアクキープラスなすびみえこアクキー、各月フルーツ娘たんシリーズアクスタから「いちご」「ちぇりー」「めろん」「ぱぱいや」「ここなつ」「きょほう」「ばなな」たちが出動ｯの豪華セットです！

item.title: Singapore-based dConstruct Robotics, which develops spatial …
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Singapore-based dConstruct Robotics, which develops spatial tech to let autonomous robots operate in complex, GPS-denied environments, raised a $125M Series A (Duc Dao/TNGlobal)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Singapore-based dConstruct Robotics, which develops spatial tech to let autonomous robots operate in complex, GPS-denied environments, raised a $125M Series A (Duc Dao/TNGlobal)

item.content:encoded: And the same for authors and books

item.title: More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage unde…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage under Texas’ abortion ban.

Experts say the trend paints a troubling picture of the harms of unnecessary delays in care. “This is striking,” one doctor said. “The trend is very clear.”

(Published July 2025)
item.content:encoded:
More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage under Texas’ abortion ban.

Experts say the trend paints a troubling picture of the harms of unnecessary delays in care. “This is striking,” one doctor said. “The trend is very clear.”

(Published July 2025)

item.title: An exclusive look inside GE Vernova’s largest gas turbine pl…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
An exclusive look inside GE Vernova’s largest gas turbine plant in Greenville, South Carolina, offers fresh evidence that the artificial intelligence boom is going strong.

Read the full story: cnb.cx/4oVVCC8
item.content:encoded:
An exclusive look inside GE Vernova’s largest gas turbine plant in Greenville, South Carolina, offers fresh evidence that the artificial intelligence boom is going strong.

Read the full story: cnb.cx/4oVVCC8

item.title: Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe loads buckets into her pickup and drives 5 miles to haul water. “That’s what keeps us alive,” Tewa said.

Four states stand in the way of a deal to give her community water.

with @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe loads buckets into her pickup and drives 5 miles to haul water. “That’s what keeps us alive,” Tewa said.

Four states stand in the way of a deal to give her community water.

with @kjzz.org

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.

item.title: I've been to Mt. Rushmore. Underwhelming. The Black Hills ar…
item.author: Oujt (@oujt.bsky.social)
item.description: I've been to Mt. Rushmore. Underwhelming. The Black Hills are great tho.
item.content:encoded: I've been to Mt. Rushmore. Underwhelming. The Black Hills are great tho.

item.title: This is amazing! 😻 $750,000 in the FY2027 budget, specifi…
item.author: Mebs ⭕️ (@mebs.bsky.social)
item.description:
This is amazing! 😻

$750,000 in the FY2027 budget, specifically to help pet owners who can't afford food for their animals. Another $750,000 goes toward affordable spay/neuter services. $1.5 million total, aimed at keeping people and their pets together"
item.content:encoded:
This is amazing! 😻

$750,000 in the FY2027 budget, specifically to help pet owners who can't afford food for their animals. Another $750,000 goes toward affordable spay/neuter services. $1.5 million total, aimed at keeping people and their pets together"

item.title: When you think about how fireworks cause serious harm to the…
item.author: Cats of Yore (@catsofyore.bsky.social)
item.description: When you think about how fireworks cause serious harm to the environment, wildlife, pets, and vulnerable people but they still happen every year because most Americans value a few minutes of entertainment more than all of those things. Photo from my collection, no date/info.
item.content:encoded: When you think about how fireworks cause serious harm to the environment, wildlife, pets, and vulnerable people but they still happen every year because most Americans value a few minutes of entertainment more than all of those things. Photo from my collection, no date/info.
